title: distichlis spicata subsp. stricta
intro: Distichlis spicata subsp. stricta, also known as Saltgrass, is a perennial grass native to the Americas, particularly found in coastal and salt-marsh areas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Saltgrass include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and colds, and supporting the immune system. Saltgrass can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies, such as salves and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
